mapper.sql: select o.order_id, o.order_number, o.customer_id, c.customer_name, o.total_amount, o.contract_no, o.order_status, o.cancel_reason, o.stock_deducted, o.production_task_id, pt.task_no, pt.task_status, (select ifnull(sum(oi.quantity), 0) from t_order_item oi where oi.order_id = o.order_id) as item_count, o.submit_review_time, o.review_time, o.contract_time, o.production_start_time, o.production_finish_time, o.outbound_time, o.complete_time, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, o.remark from t_order o left join t_customer c on c.customer_id = o.customer_id left join t_production_task pt on pt.task_id = o.production_task_id
mapper.select: select oi.item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, p.product_name, p.specification, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price from t_order_item oi left join t_product p on p.product_id = oi.product_id where oi.order_id = #{orderId} order by oi.item_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into t_order ( order_number, customer_id, total_amount, contract_no, order_status, cancel_reason, stock_deducted, production_task_id, submit_review_time, review_time, contract_time, production_start_time, production_finish_time, outbound_time, complete_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{orderNumber}, #{customerId}, #{totalAmount}, #{contractNo}, #{orderStatus}, #{cancelReason}, #{stockDeducted}, #{productionTaskId}, #{submitReviewTime}, #{reviewTime}, #{contractTime}, #{productionStartTime}, #{productionFinishTime}, #{outboundTime}, #{completeTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.delete:
delete from t_order where order_id in
#{orderId}

delete from t_order_item where order_id in
#{orderId}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_order_item (order_id, product_id, quantity, unit_price) values
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.unitPrice})
